# DataPingo

> DataPingo builds productivity apps for Confluence and Jira teams on the Atlassian Marketplace. Our tools automate bulk operations and content management — helping teams save hours of manual work.

DataPingo specializes in Atlassian Forge apps that integrate natively with Confluence Cloud and Jira Cloud. Products are trusted by teams for project template management, client onboarding automation, sprint documentation, and bulk commenting across Jira issues.

## Products

- [Bulk Page Cloner for Confluence](https://datapingo.com/products/bulk-page-cloner): Clone individual pages or entire page hierarchies in Confluence with a single click. Supports template reuse across projects, spaces, and teams.
- [Bulk Comments for Jira](https://datapingo.com/products/bulk-comments): Compose a comment once and post it to up to 25 Jira issues at once, or replicate an existing comment — images, videos, and files included — across many tickets.

## Company

- [About Us](https://datapingo.com/company/about-us): DataPingo's mission, background, and team.
- [Contact](https://datapingo.com/company/contact): Reach the DataPingo team for support, partnerships, or inquiries.
- [Careers](https://datapingo.com/company/careers): Open roles and culture at DataPingo.

## Resources

- [Documentation](https://datapingo.com/resources/documentation): Getting started guides, feature documentation, and how-to articles for all DataPingo products.
- [Blog](https://datapingo.com/resources/blog): Product updates, tips, and insights for Confluence teams.
- [Use Cases](https://datapingo.com/resources/use-cases): Real-world scenarios showing how teams use DataPingo to automate Confluence workflows.

## Partners

- [Become a Solution Partner](https://datapingo.com/partners/become-a-solution-partner): Recommend or resell DataPingo apps to your clients and earn recurring commission.
- [Become a Marketing Partner](https://datapingo.com/partners/become-a-marketing-partner): Co-market with DataPingo through content, campaigns, and joint promotion.
